notes: Multi-head Latent Attention, the DeepSeek-V2/V3 attention variant that compresses the KV cache into a latent vector. Spoken as an initialism, letter by letter: em-el-AY (STRESS on the final letter). Not pronounced as a word. Collides with other meanings of MLA (Modern Language Association, etc.), so in ML context spell it out and rely on the surrounding words Multi-head Latent Attention.
